en-US.title: Dalee
en-US.subtitle: A new word every day
en-US.description:
Dalee is a daily word puzzle. Every day there's one new five-letter word, and everyone gets the same one — so it's you against the word (and your friends).

You have six guesses. After each guess, the tiles show you how close you are:

• Green — right letter, right spot
• Yellow — right letter, wrong spot
• Gray — not in the word

Use the clues, narrow it down, and crack the word before you run out of guesses. Come back tomorrow for a fresh one and keep your streak alive.

Simple to learn, tough to master, and over in a few minutes a day. One word. Six tries. How long can your streak go?

— One new puzzle every day
— Six guesses with color-coded hints
— Build and protect your daily streak
— Clean, distraction-free design
— No account, no ads, no clutter — just the word
en-US.promoText: One fresh five-letter puzzle a day. Six guesses, color clues, and a streak to protect. Same word for everyone — how fast can you crack it?
en-US.releaseNotes: First release — one new word every day. Six guesses, color hints, and streaks. Good luck!
